titleStmt.title: SII 33.165: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 165. (A.R. No. B 270 of 1950.) Turimella, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up near the Surabhēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1462, Sārvari, Āshāḍha śu. 11, Tuesday corresponding to 1540 A.D., June 15, Tuesday.

Registers the grant of the village Chōḷavīḍu, renamed Surabhēśvarapuram by Nāgappaṁgāru, son of Paṇḍari Rāmābhaṭlu to the god Surabhēśvara. The gift village situated in Ēṟuvasīma was held as Pārupatyam by the donor, Venkaṭādri-Ayya, son of Yiṁḍḍetūri Timma-Jōśyulu and nephew of Bhūtanāṁtani Rāmābhaṭlayyavāru, who is described as the rājyabhāradhuraṁdhara of the king, and is stated to be governing Udayagiri-Durgam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakhava¨rṣaṁbulu
1462 Agunēṭi śārvari saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha śu 11 ma śrīmatu Akhi
la jagadārādhyulayina śrīmatu turimeḷla jamadagni Āśra
mastāna śrīsurabhēśvara dēvara divya śrī pādapadmaṁbulaku ka
śyapagotra Āśvalāyinasūtra ·ṛkśākhādhyāyulaina paṁḍḍari rā
mābhaṭluṁgāri komāruṁḍu nāgappaṁgāru sāṣṭāṁgaṁdaṁḍa
pramāṇaṁbulu sama¨rppiṁcci yiccina grāma dāna dhamma śāsanakrama
meṭlannanu . śrī¨rmanmahārājādhirājarājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa śrī Acyutadēvamahārāyalu . vijayanagaramaṁdu priti
vī sāṁmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu . rāyalarājyabhāraduraṁdharu
ṁḍaina . bhūtanāṁtani rāmābhaṭluyyavāri mēnalluṁḍaina viṣṇu
va¨rdhanagotra Āśvalāyanasūtra rukśākhādhyāyulaIna yi
ṁḍḍelūri timājōśyulaṁgāri komāruṁḍaina veṁkkaṭādri Ayya
vāru vudayagiridu¨rggaṁ sāṁmrājya pālanaṁ seyucuṁḍḍa mā
ku pārupatyānaku pālicci Iyyanavadariṁccina yeruvaśīmaku jellē
Ākaṁvīṭi pāyalōni cōḷavīṭigrāmamu tadhātidhi AIna pratha
mekādaśi puṇyakālamaṁdu . śrīmadakilajagatārādhyulaina śrī
surabhēśvara dēvuniki Aṁggaraṁggavaibhavālakunnu ṣoḍacavupacā
rālakunnu Avunaṭlugānu kāsyapagōtra Āśvalāyanasūtra ·ṛ
kśākhādhyāyulaina paṁḍḍari rāmābhaṭluṁgāri komāruṁḍaina
nāgappaṁgāru sahiraṇyōdaka dāna dārāpūrvakamugāṁnu
veṁkhaṭādrayyavāriki puṇyamavunaṭlugānu dāravośi
Iccina cōḷavīṭi grāmānaṁ gala nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa A
kṣiṇa Āgāmi sidhasādhyaṁbhulu mōdalaina Aṣṭhabhōgatējasāmya
lunnu śrīmadakhila jagadārādhyulaina śrīsurabhēśvaradēvunini
Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāIgānu Anubhaviṁccumani śrīkhaśyapago
tra Āśvalāyanasūtra ·ṛkśākhādhyāyulaina paṁḍḍari
rāmābhaṭla komāruṁḍaina nāgappaṁgāru cōḷavīḍunusura
bhēśvarapuramani pratināmaṁceśi sama¨rppiṁccina dha¨rmma
śāsanamu . śrī śrī svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ . paradattāpahāriṇē svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁbhavēt
dānapālanayō¨rmaṁpadhyēdānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ
dānasvaggamavāpnoti pālunādacyutaṁpadaṁ
śrīrāma
Digital edition of SII 33.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
